home.title: DreamTeams
home.heroDescription: Innovative service for team formation at IT competitions. All current events aggregated in one place.
home.ctaText: All IT hackathons in one place. Find a team or post your event in 5 minutes

about.title: About the Platform
about.description: First IT hackathon platform in Russia. Connecting participants and organizers. No more searching through hundreds of sources — everything's here.

home.featuresDescription: Everything for successful hackathon participation and hosting

unique.title: Only One in Russia
unique.description: First IT hackathon aggregator with built-in team search

demand.title: Real Need
demand.description: 67% of participants can't find a team. We solve this problem

transparent.title: No Ads
transparent.description: We earn from event listings, not from your data

rating.title: Participant Rating
rating.description: Choose reliable teammates by participation history

cta.title: Start Today
cta.description: Thousands of participants already found teams. Join now

testimonials.title: What People Say
testimonials.description: Stories from participants and organizers who found their teammates

alex.name: Alexander Petrov
alex.text: Found a team 2 days before the hackathon. We won first place! Without DreamTeams I'd definitely be sitting at home

maria.name: Maria Ivanova
maria.text: First time participating in a hackathon. Immediately found people with the right stack. We made it to the finals together

dmitry.name: Dmitry Smirnov
dmitry.text: Hackathon aggregator is just a gem. Used to search through 10+ sources. Now everything's in one place

techlab.name: TechLab
techlab.text: Posted our hackathon and got 200+ applications in a week. The audience is truly targeted and active

innohub.name: InnoHub
innohub.text: The platform solves a real problem. Participants come with teams already formed — saves time at the event

devfest.name: DevFest Moscow
devfest.text: Real-time analytics on applications is very helpful. We can see right away who's missing in teams

aggregator.title: All Hackathons Here
aggregator.description: Forget dozens of Telegram channels. Smart filters by date, tech stack, and format

teams.title: Search by Skills
teams.description: Need frontend? Find a React developer in a minute. Filters by tech and experience

organizers.title: For Organizers
organizers.description: Post your hackathon and get targeted audience. Real-time analytics on registrations
